Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-05-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

NATHANIEL DUNN, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs FOSTER PEPPER PLLC,

Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was in file.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) ZVUE CORPORATION for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,765.45
Prejudgment Interest - $5267.52
Costs - $455.00
Total judgment in the amount of $44,487.97

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
